name: create_bucket
description: Create a new storage bucket in your Backblaze B2 account. Bucket names must be globally unique across all B2 accounts, between 6 and 50 characters, and contain only letters, digits, and hyphens.

parameters.name: bucketName
parameters.description: The globally unique name for the new bucket (6-50 chars, letters/digits/hyphens only).

parameters.name: bucketType
parameters.description: Visibility of the bucket: 'allPublic' (files downloadable without auth) or 'allPrivate' (authorization required).

parameters.name: lifecycleRules
parameters.description: Optional lifecycle rules to auto-delete or hide files after a specified number of days.
